name: @pixelrpg/engine
description: Cross-platform Excalibur.js engine and data layer for the PixelRPG map editor

scripts.build:barrels: gjsify barrels src/systems src/components src/services src/scenes src/format src/resource src/commands src/sync src/entity src/entity/specs
scripts.check:barrels: gjsify barrels --check src/systems src/components src/services src/scenes src/format src/resource src/commands src/sync src/entity src/entity/specs

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
